title: Trump calls on Kurds to aid U.S. effort in Iran, offers support
summary_full: In calls to Kurdish minority leaders in Iran and neighboring Iraq, President Donald Trump offered U.S. support to insurgent efforts against Tehran.
summary_public: In calls to Kurdish minority leaders in Iran and neighboring Iraq, President Donald Trump offered U.S. support to insurgent efforts against Tehran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump calls on Kurds to aid U.S. effort in Iran
